name: markdown-to-video
description: Convert Markdown slides into videos with Remotion.

scripts.dev: npm run prepare:preview && npm run studio
scripts.dev:qwen: PREVIEW_MARKDOWN=examples/demo/qwen-local.md npm run prepare:preview && npm run studio
scripts.download:qwen:modelscope: mkdir -p .models && if [ -d .models/Qwen3-TTS-12Hz-0.6B-CustomVoice/.git ]; then git -C .models/Qwen3-TTS-12Hz-0.6B-CustomVoice pull && git -C .models/Qwen3-TTS-12Hz-0.6B-CustomVoice lfs pull; else git clone https://www.modelscope.cn/Qwen/Qwen3-TTS-12Hz-0.6B-CustomVoice.git .models/Qwen3-TTS-12Hz-0.6B-CustomVoice; fi
